originalTitle: Ghanaian footballer killed after armed attackers open fire at team bus
title: Ghanaian footballer killed after armed attackers open fire at team bus
content: The team was returning from a match when they were attacked by "masked men wielding guns", officials say.

originalTitle: Leo becomes first Pope to visit Algeria at start of major Africa tour
title: Leo becomes first Pope to visit Algeria at start of major Africa tour
content: Leo XIV wants the world's attention on a continent vital to the Church's future, an aide says.

originalTitle: Ex-Nigerian oil minister denies taking bribes
title: Ex-Nigerian oil minister denies taking bribes
content: Diezani Alison-Madueke is accused of living “a life of luxury” in the UK at properties paid for and refurbished by industry figures.

originalTitle: EU: No peace possible while “Lebanon is in flames”
title: EU: No peace possible while “Lebanon is in flames”
content: Von der Leyen warns Hormuz closure and Israeli strikes on Lebanon threaten regional stability.

originalTitle: What are the pros and cons of Trump’s Iranian naval blockade?
title: What are the pros and cons of Trump’s Iranian naval blockade?
content: What does Donald Trump’s naval blockade of Iranian ports look like and can it achieve what the US president wants?

originalTitle: Bahrain summons Iraqi envoy as pro-Iranian attacks persist in Gulf
title: Bahrain summons Iraqi envoy as pro-Iranian attacks persist in Gulf
content: Move reflects regional alarm over attacks by pro-Iranian groups based in Iraq, which continue despite ceasefire.

originalTitle: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
content: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.

originalTitle: Katya Adler: Jubilation in Budapest will be felt in Europe but leaves Moscow cold
title: Katya Adler: Jubilation in Budapest will be felt in Europe but leaves Moscow cold
content: European leaders share Hungarians' joy over the ousting of Vladimir Putin's EU ally, writes the BBC's Europe editor.

originalTitle: Italian PM condemns ally Trump over 'unacceptable' Pope criticism
title: Italian PM condemns ally Trump over 'unacceptable' Pope criticism
content: Italy's prime minister and the US president are close allies, but Trump has refused to apologise to the "very weak" Pope Leo XIV.

originalTitle: Spurs captain Romero out for rest of season with injury
title: Spurs captain Romero out for rest of season with injury
content: Tottenham captain Cristian Romero is set to miss the rest of the season with the knee injury he sustained in their 1-0 defeat at Sunderland.

title: Liverpool 'can do special things' against PSG - Slot
content: Liverpool boss Arne Slot on why his side believe they can overcome a two-goal deficit against reigning champions Paris St-Germain in the Champions League on Tuesday.

originalTitle: Tottenham in advanced talks to sign Robertson
title: Tottenham in advanced talks to sign Robertson
content: Tottenham are in advanced talks over a free transfer for Liverpool defender Andy Robertson this summer.
